towards Venus and Mercury (as explained in the previious
chart). Mars, the causative planet for technical eduation is 5th
from Venus and Mercury. Therefore the native will be having
good intellect and possessing more than 2-3 academic
qualifications.

88 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
MERCURY+VENUS+MARS+Aspected by Jupiter indicating
extraordinary educational qualification (high academic
qualifications). Further, sun represents the natgive's father, Jupiter
is in the 2 from Dragon Tail Representing The Flag of fame
IS 2 Jupiter.
SUN+JUPITER=D.TAIL
Hence, native's father will be haveing extraodinary status under
a flag (i.e. in Government).sun is the father and in 2nd there is
Jupiter. Work is Saturn who is 5 from Jupiter. Hence the
native's work will be related to RAJA GURU YOGA-The
Position of a Master in Government of Royal Court or such
equivalent post like that of a judge or 1st Class Magistrate or a
district Judge.
